summary: Build “আমার ঘুমন্ত ভিলা (Amar Ghumontovilla)”, a Bengali personal literary portal with nature/floral aesthetic featuring sections for Home, Poems, Stories, Essays, and Contact, including per-section comments, a contact form, and Google Translate widget.
architectural_notes: Static site structure using HTML + external styles.css and script.js; section switching handled client-side.
Google Translate script loaded via translate.google.com with callback init.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Floral bouquet hero photograph/illustration with soft natural lighting (flower-bouquet-hero.dim_1920x800.png)
- Seamless subtle floral pattern background texture, low contrast (floral-pattern-bg.dim_1024x1024.png)

existing_features.title: Create a single-page literary portal named “Amar Ghumontovilla” with top navigation and five sections: Home, Poems, Stories, Essays, and Contact. Navigation must switch the visible section without a full page reload and must visually indicate the active section.
Implement a consistent “hero” banner at the top of each section containing a floral image and a section title, matching the structure in the provided HTML (hero image + heading).

Add per-section comments for Home, Poems, Stories, and Essays: each section must display a comment form (textarea + submit) and a list of submitted comments for that section. Comments must be persisted on the backend and loaded on page visit/refresh.

Implement the Contact section to display the email address “contact@amarghumontovilla.in” and provide a contact form with Name, Email, and Message fields plus a Send button. Submissions must be persisted on the backend (store messages) and the UI must show a clear success state after submit.
Add an on-page translation widget placeholder container with id "google_translate_element" and integrate Google Translate element loading on the frontend so the widget renders in the UI.

Configure SEO and social metadata for the app equivalent to the provided HTML: title, meta description, keywords, author, Open Graph (title/description/image/url), and canonical URL for https://www.amarghumontovilla.in.

Apply a coherent, nature-inspired floral visual theme across the app (color palette, typography, spacing, buttons, form styling) with a calm editorial feel suitable for reading long-form text; ensure it is consistently applied to navigation, hero, content, and forms.

Generate and include required static images in the app under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI (hero image and optional background pattern) instead of hotlinking external images.

new_feature_requests.summary: Multi-section literary site navigation (Home, Poems, Stories, Essays, Contact) with section switching via JS
Per-section comments UI (forms + comments list) for Home/Poems/Stories/Essays
Contact page with displayed email and contact form (name/email/message)
Integrate Google Translate widget (google_translate_element) for on-page translation
Nature-inspired floral aesthetic with hero image banner on each section
SEO/social metadata setup (description/keywords/OG tags/canonical) for the site
